summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trail Test
description: This test case validates that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: To verify that system encrypts patient data using AES-256 and stores audit trails as per the requirement.
prerequisites: System should be in a functional state
Patient record should exist in the system

test_steps.description: Enter a valid patient record into the system
Inspect the stored data to verify that it is encrypted with AES-256

expected_result: Data is encrypted with AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
acceptance_criteria: System encrypts patient data using AES-256
Audit trails are stored for every database change
